rag_rules: Use `assign` for implementation-level output bindings only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they describe input envelopes or output ranges with concrete bounds
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Component type contracts should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without using implementation-only paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume` for preconditions and `guarantee` for postconditions in component type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
